stemHtml: You encounter an engine failure with your single engine airplane overhead a dense forest. Choose the best configuration for an emergency landing…

options.a: Flaps up, gear up and aim for low trees.
options.b: Flaps down, gear down and aim for low trees.
options.c: Flaps up, gear up and aim for high trees.
options.d: Flaps up, gear down and aim for high trees.
